nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as sole source of ideas without human input
nodes.grounding_span: I'll use AI as a quick tool to get some ideas to draw inspiration from

nodes.label: AI as coding assistant for unfamiliar languages
nodes.grounding_span: I may need help solving programming issues or analyzing code

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI feedback as irrelevant or unhelpful
nodes.grounding_span: I will occasionally ask AI for honest feedback about what is good or bad

nodes.label: AI as collaborator for iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: It's definitely a back and forth for the most part

nodes.label: Human control over creative decisions
nodes.grounding_span: I'll always make my own final changes to the dialog in the end

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI providing untrustworthy or broken code
nodes.grounding_span: AI would offer some code that it guaranteed was tested and working, and despite several hours trying to fix the issue using its 'tested and working' code, I couldn't get it to work

nodes.label: AI as practical problem solver
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-wasting source of frustration
nodes.grounding_span: I spent several hours trying to solve the problem until I asked AI for help, and within 5 minutes, I had the problem fixed

nodes.label: Creative satisfaction and enjoyment
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy coming up with ideas for a game, or trying to work through different problems

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: within 5 minutes, I had the problem fixed

nodes.label: Quality and accuracy of work output
nodes.grounding_span: it's unlikely to completely fulfill my goals/needs

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: within 5 minutes, I had the problem fixed

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for coding
nodes.grounding_span: despite several hours trying to fix the issue using its 'tested and working' code, I couldn't get it to work

nodes.label: Preference for human handling of creative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I would prefer to do most of the creative tasks myself

nodes.label: Cautious reliance on AI
nodes.grounding_span: I think my use of AI will remain pretty much the same

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I'll ask a general question, have the AI respond, and then give it all the extra information it needs to refine the response further

nodes.label: Maintaining creative control and final judgment
nodes.grounding_span: I'll always make my own final changes to the dialog in the end
